title: argemone pleiacantha var. pinnatisecta
intro: Argemone pleiacantha var. pinnatisecta, also known as Mexican prickly poppy, is a plant species belonging to the poppy family (Papaveraceae) and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Argemone pleiacantha var. pinnatisecta include the relief of pain and inflammation, as well as the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions.
